mapper.select: SELECT s.id, s.solar_edge_id, s.solar_edge_api_key, t.value as time_zone_value FROM site s INNER JOIN time_zone t on t.id = s.id_time_zone WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.is_delete = 0 AND s.status = 1 AND t.is_delete = 0 AND t.status = 1
SELECT id, table_name, manufacture FROM device_group where id IN (179, 180, 181) AND status = 1 AND is_delete = 0
SELECT id, modbusdevicenumber, devicename, serial_number, datatablename, id_device_type FROM device where id_site = #{id} AND status = 1 AND is_delete = 0 AND communication_method = 3
SELECT id FROM site WHERE solar_edge_id is NOT NULL AND solar_edge_api_key is NOT NULL AND solar_edge_auto_backfill = 1 AND is_delete = 0 AND status = 1 LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
